title: Service of process
doc_html:
§2194. Service of process

            A company shall maintain an agent for service of process in the state of Louisiana.

            Acts 2019, No. 286, §2, eff. July 1, 2019.
doc_text:
§2194.  Service of process
A company shall maintain an agent for service of process in the state of Louisiana.
Acts 2019, No. 286, §2, eff. July 1, 2019.
